name: human
label: Homo sapiens rCRS
fasta_header: NC_012920.1 Homo sapiens mitochondrion, complete genome
redwood_command: redwood plot --gff annotation.gff --main-bam reads.mapped.bam --doubled main --no-timestamp -o plot --query False
note: Reduced to the first 80 coordinate-sorted real mapped alignments for faster plotting iteration.

name: drosophila
label: Drosophila melanogaster
fasta_header: NC_024511.2 Drosophila melanogaster mitochondrion, complete genome
redwood_command: redwood plot --gff annotation.gff --main-bam reads.mapped.bam --doubled main --no-timestamp -o plot --query False
note: Reduced from the initial mapping pass to a 30-50x real-read fixture for faster plotting iteration.

name: mouse
label: Mus musculus
fasta_header: NC_005089.1 Mus musculus mitochondrion, complete genome
redwood_command: redwood plot --gff annotation.gff --main-bam reads.mapped.bam --doubled main --no-timestamp -o plot --query False
note: Reduced from the initial mapping pass to a 30-50x real-read fixture for faster plotting iteration.

name: sponge
label: Spheciospongia vesparium
fasta_header: MZ675556.1 UNVERIFIED: Spheciospongia vesparium mitochondrion sequence
redwood_command: redwood plot --gff annotation.gff --main-bam reads.mapped.bam --doubled main --no-timestamp -o plot --query False
note: Real paired-end Illumina fixture; kept at about 26x because mitochondrial read fraction is low in the bounded prefix.

name: beroe
label: Beroe forskalii manuscript reads
note: PMC6991124 points to PRJNA421807, but public run accessions were not returned by NCBI SRA runinfo/search or ENA run search on 2026-05-15.
